## What would you like to add or improve?

<!-- Clear description of the feature or improvement -->

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New accessible component (`examples/components/`)
- [ ] New Claude prompt (`prompts/`)
- [ ] New CSV data (specify database: `data/_____.csv`)
- [ ] New framework example in SKILL.md (Vue 3, Remix, Qwik, etc.)
- [ ] New template (`templates/`)
- [ ] `search.py` improvement
- [ ] Other documentation

## Why is this useful?

<!-- Which users benefit? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- Reference a WCAG SC, WAI-ARIA pattern, or real use case if possible -->

## WCAG / WAI-ARIA reference (if applicable)

- **WCAG SC**: [e.g. 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured]
- **WAI-ARIA APG pattern**: [e.g. https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/]

## Are you willing to contribute this yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] I can help review someone else's PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
